titleStmt.title: SII 28.288: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 288. (A.R. No. 442 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, second Prākāra, east wall, left of entrance.

Records a royal order addressed to the tāṉattār of the temple of Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār granting one vēli of first grade wet land out of the vāra-paṟṟu of Āṟṟūr, as tiru-nandavana-ppuṟa-iṟai-ili (tax free land granted for the sake of the garden attached to the temple) for the maintenance (jīvaṉam) of those tending the temple garden. The poṉvari and all such āyams (levies) as also āḷ-amaiñji-tēvai (free-labour or payment in lieu) as assessed on the land granted could also be collected and utilised for the same purpose. The record was attested by Ādittaṉ Gaṇapati-āḻvāṉ alias Kāḍuveṭṭi of Kappalūr alias Ulagaḷanda-chōḻanallūr in Muttūr-kūṟṟam in Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Aruḷicceyal Āṟṟūrk kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḷur Uṭaiyār tirukkāmiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku Iṉṉāyaṉār
kku ciṟṟerikku kiḻakku Āṟṟukkut teṟku Akaram Irācanārāyaṇac caturvvetimaṅkalattu Ellaikku vaṭakku kāṭuveṭṭikaḷukku Āra Āṇṭā
ār peruṅkaruṇai Āḷā ceykiṟa ttu vāyttāṉ tirunantavaṉañceyyum pe ku civaṉattukku patiṉoṉṟāvatu Āvaṇi mā
tam mutal Āṟṟūr vārapaṟṟu naṉcey muta ttarattile veli nilam poṉvari Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Āḷamaiñci tevaiyum U
ṭpaṭa tirunantavaṉappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyākat tantom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu puravilum variyilum kaḻittu cantirā
tittavaṟ celvatakka kallum veṭṭi � nilattil tiruccūlattāpaṉamum paṇṇikkoṇṭu tirunantavaṉappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṉupavittu
ppotuka Ippaṭikku Ivai pāṇṭi maṇṭalattu muttūrk kūṟṟattuk kappalūrāṉa Ulakaḷantacoḻanallūr Ātittaṉ kaṇapati Āḻvāṉāṉa kā
ṭuveṭṭi Eḻuttu tiruveḻuttu tulyam .
Digital edition of SII 28.288 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
